ForceEnabled.title: Force Extension Enabled
ForceEnabled.description: When set to true, the extension cannot be disabled by the user.

ManagedRules.title: Managed Detection Rules
ManagedRules.description: Mandatory detection rules applied to all users. Users cannot edit or remove these rules.

ManagedDomains.title: Managed Monitored Domains
ManagedDomains.description: Domains that are always monitored regardless of user domain settings.

LockDomains.title: Lock Domain Configuration
LockDomains.description: When true, users cannot add or remove domains from the allowed domains list.

LockRules.title: Lock Rule Configuration
LockRules.description: When true, users cannot add, edit, or remove custom detection rules.

MinimumAction.title: Minimum Enforcement Action
MinimumAction.description: The minimum action to take on any detection. Possible values: warn, redact, block.

EntropyThreshold.title: Entropy Detection Threshold
EntropyThreshold.description: Override the Shannon entropy threshold for high-entropy string detection.

ShowNotifications.title: Force Notification Setting
ShowNotifications.description: Override whether detection notifications are shown to users.
